content.name: Station Production Overview
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
Adds a [b]Production Overview[/b] tab to the info panel tab strip in the map menu (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates, groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned (not yet built) modules.
[h2][b]Features[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Production Overview Tab[/b]: A dedicated tab in the station info panel shows all production and consumption data at a glance. [*] [b]Sector Production Overview[/b]: A dedicated tab in the sector info panel shows all production stations within the sector with their respective production data, equal to the single station production overview. [*] [b]Per-ware rates[/b]: For each ware the tab displays produced, consumed, and net total amounts per hour. [*] [b]Ware icons[/b]: Each ware row shows the ware icon alongside its name for quick visual identification. [*] [b]Production issue indicators[/b]: If any production modules for a ware are waiting for resources or waiting for storage, the ware name is highlighted in warning colour and a mouseover tooltip lists the exact issue counts per state. [*] [b]Live vs Estimated mode[/b]: A dropdown lets you switch between [i]Current (live state)[/i] (reflecting only active modules and workforce) and [i]Estimated (all modules active)[/i] (the theoretical maximum output). [*] [b]Active module count[/b]: In live mode the module count column shows how many modules are currently running out of the total installed (e.g. [b]3 (5)[/b]). [*] [b]Ware grouping[/b]: Wares are grouped into [b]Products[/b] (not consumed on-site), [b]Intermediates[/b] (produced and consumed on-site), and [b]Resources[/b] (pure inputs, not produced on-site). [*] [b]Planned module preview[/b]: When the construction plan contains new modules a second delta row per ware shows the expected impact once those modules are built. [*] [b]Quick-navigation buttons[/b]: [i]Configure Station[/i] and [i]Station Overview[/i] buttons are available at the bottom of the tab. [/list] [h2][b]Requirements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]8.00HF4[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v8.0.4.3[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]. [list] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/552]UI Extensions and HUD[/url] [/list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]9.00 beta 3[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v9.0.0.0.3[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]. [list] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/552]UI Extensions and HUD[/url] [/list] [*] [b]Mod Support APIs[/b]: Version 1.95 or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url]. [list] [*] Available on Steam: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2042901274]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/url] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/503]Mod Support APIs[/url] [/list] [/list] [h2][b]Installation[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Steam Workshop[/b]: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3695609478]Station Production Overview[/url] - only for [b]Game version 8.00[/b] with latest Steam version of the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] mod (version 80.43 from April 8). [*] [b]Nexus Mods[/b]: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/2049]Station Production Overview[/url] [/list] [h2][b]Usage[/b][/h2]
Open the map, select a player-owned station, and click the [b]Production Overview[/b] tab in the info panel on the left or right side.
[h2]Production Overview Tab[/h2]
The tab renders a table with one row per ware that is produced or consumed by the station's production and processing modules.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_overview_tab.png[/img]
[h2]Live vs Estimated mode[/h2]
Use the dropdown at the top of the tab to switch between two display modes:
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_calculation_type_dropdown.png[/img] [list] [*] [b]Current (live state) / hour[/b]: uses the actual running rate from the engine, accounting for modules that are idle due to missing resources or workforce shortages. The Modules column shows [b]active (total)[/b] when not all modules are running. [*] [b]Estimated (all modules active) / hour[/b]: reports the theoretical rate assuming all installed modules run at full capacity with the current workforce bonus applied. [/list] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_estimated.png[/img]
[h2]Planned module preview[/h2]
If the station's construction plan contains new production or processing modules that have not been built yet, a secondary delta row appears directly below the ware row. It shows: [list] [*] [b](+N)[/b] in the Modules column: the number of planned new modules [*] The additional production/consumption contribution those modules would add once built [/list] [h2]Ware groups[/h2]
Wares are organized into three groups: [list] [*] [b]Products[/b]: wares produced at this station that are not also consumed as a resource by any other module here. [*] [b]Intermediates[/b]: wares that are both produced and consumed internally (e.g. a station that refines ore into silicon and then uses that silicon further). [*] [b]Resources[/b]: wares consumed as raw inputs that are not produced on-site. [/list] [h2]Sector Production Overview[/h2]
When viewing the info panel for a sector, a similar [b]Production Overview[/b] tab lists all player-owned production stations in that sector with their respective production data, equal to the single station production overview.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/sector_production_overview_tab.png[/img]
[h2][b]Credits[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Author[/b]: Chem O`Dun, on [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Nexus Mods[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Steam Workshop[/url] [*] [i]"X4: Foundations"[/i] is a trademark of [url=https://www.egosoft.com]Egosoft[/url]. [/list] [h2][b]Acknowledgements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [url=https://www.egosoft.com]EGOSOFT[/url] - for the X series. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url] - for the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] that makes this extension possible. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url] — for the [b]Mod Support APIs[/b] that power the UI hooks. [/list]

text.description: Adds a Production Overview tab to the info panel tab strip (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations in the map menu. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates (live or estimated), groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned modules.

Ajoute un onglet Aperçu de la production au panneau d'informations (à côté de Info objet, Équipage, etc.) pour les stations appartenant au joueur dans le menu de la carte. Affiche les taux de production et de consommation par marchandise (en direct ou estimés), regroupe les marchandises en Produits, Intermédiaires et Ressources, et prévisualise l'impact des modules prévus.

Añade una pestaña de Resumen de Producción al panel de información (junto a Info del objeto, Tripulación, etc.) para estaciones del jugador en el menú del mapa. Muestra tasas de producción y consumo por mercancía (en vivo o estimadas), agrupa mercancías en Productos, Intermedios y Recursos, y previsualiza el impacto de módulos planificados.

Aggiunge una scheda Panoramica produzione al pannello informazioni (accanto a Info oggetto, Equipaggio, ecc.) per le stazioni di proprietà del giocatore nel menu della mappa. Mostra i tassi di produzione e consumo per merce (in tempo reale o stimati), raggruppa le merci in Prodotti, Intermedi e Risorse, e visualizza in anteprima l'impatto dei moduli pianificati.

Přidává záložku Přehled výroby do informačního panelu (vedle Info o objektu, Posádka atd.) pro stanice vlastněné hráčem v mapovém menu. Zobrazuje míry výroby a spotřeby po zboží (živě nebo odhadnuté), seskupuje zboží do Produktů, Meziproduktů a Zdrojů a zobrazuje náhled dopadu plánovaných modulů.

Adds a Production Overview tab to the info panel tab strip (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations in the map menu. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates (live or estimated), groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned modules.

Dodaje zakładkę Przegląd produkcji do panelu informacyjnego (obok Info o obiekcie, Załoga itp.) dla stacji należących do gracza w menu mapy. Pokazuje wskaźniki produkcji i zużycia według towarów (na żywo lub szacowane), grupuje towary na Produkty, Półprodukty i Zasoby oraz wyświetla podgląd wpływu planowanych modułów.

Fügt einen Produktionsübersichts-Tab zum Info-Panel (neben Objektinfo, Besatzung usw.) für spielereigene Stationen im Kartenmenü hinzu. Zeigt Produktions- und Verbrauchsraten pro Ware (live oder geschätzt), gruppiert Waren in Produkte, Zwischenprodukte und Ressourcen und zeigt eine Vorschau der Auswirkungen geplanter Module.

Adiciona uma aba Visão Geral da Produção ao painel de informações (ao lado de Info do Objeto, Tripulação, etc.) para estações de propriedade do jogador no menu do mapa. Mostra taxas de produção e consumo por mercadoria (ao vivo ou estimadas), agrupa mercadorias em Produtos, Intermediários e Recursos, e pré-visualiza o impacto de módulos planejados.
マップメニューのプレイヤー所有ステーションの情報パネル（オブジェクト情報、乗組員などと並んで）に生産概要タブを追加します。商品ごとの生産率と消費率（ライブまたは推定）を表示し、商品を製品、中間製品、資源にグループ化し、計画されたモジュールの影響をプレビューします。
지도 메뉴의 플레이어 소유 스테이션에 대한 정보 패널(오브젝트 정보, 승무원 등과 함께)에 생산 개요 탭을 추가합니다. 상품별 생산 및 소비율(실시간 또는 추정)을 표시하고, 상품을 제품, 중간재, 자원으로 그룹화하며, 계획된 모듈의 영향을 미리 봅니다.
在地图菜单中为玩家拥有的空间站的信息面板（与物体信息、船员等并列）添加生产概览选项卡。显示按商品的生产和消耗率（实时或估计），将商品分组为产品、中间产品和资源，并预览计划模块的影响。
在地圖選單中為玩家擁有的空間站的資訊面板（與物體資訊、船員等並列）新增生產概覽標籤。顯示按商品的生產和消耗率（即時或估計），將商品分組為產品、中間產品和資源，並預覽計畫模組的影響。

Harita menüsünde oyuncuya ait istasyonlar için bilgi paneline (Nesne Bilgisi, Mürettebat vb. ile birlikte) bir Üretim Özeti sekmesi ekler. Mal başına üretim ve tüketim oranlarını (canlı veya tahmini) gösterir, malları Ürünler, Ara Ürünler ve Kaynaklar olarak gruplandırır ve planlanan modüllerin etkisini önizler.

Додає вкладку Огляд виробництва до інформаційної панелі (поряд з Інфо про об'єкт, Екіпаж тощо) для станцій гравця в меню карти. Показує показники виробництва та споживання за товарами (наживо або оціночно), групує товари на Продукти, Напівпродукти та Ресурси та попередньо переглядає вплив запланованих модулів.
